WITH target_customer AS (

    FROM transactions_1k 
    WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25'

consumption_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS total_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2013-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS total_2013
    FROM yearmonth y

WITH customers_consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    INNER JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
segment_min_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM customers_consumption_2013
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY Segment
),
least_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.CustomerID,
        cc.Segment,
        cc.total_consumption
    FROM customers_consumption_2013 cc
    INNER JOIN segment_min_consumption smc 
        ON cc.Segment = smc.Segment 
        AND cc.total_consumption = smc.min_consumption
),
segment_avg_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS avg_consumption
    FROM least_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
),
averages AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN avg_consumption END) AS avg_sme,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS avg_lam,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS avg_kam
    FROM segment_avg_consumption
)
SELECT 
    avg_sme - avg_lam AS diff_SME_LAM,
    avg_lam - avg_kam AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    avg_kam - avg_sme AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM averages;

WITH consumption_by_segment_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
        AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivot_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM consumption_by_segment_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentage_change AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,
        CASE 
            WHEN consumption_2013 > 0 
            THEN ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2013) * 100.0
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS percentage_increase
    FROM pivot_consumption
    WHERE consumption_2012 IS NOT NULL 
        AND consumption_2013 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    consumption_2012,
    consumption_2013,
    increase,
    percentage_increase
FROM percentage_change
ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;

    JOIN patient_1959 p ON lab.ID = p.ID
    WHERE lab.Date >= '1981-11-01' AND lab.Date <= '1981-11-30'

        MIN(height) AS min_height
    FROM Player

    SELECT 
        'highest' AS player_group,
        AVG(paf.avg_finishing) AS group_avg_finishing
    FROM player_avg_finishing paf
    CROSS JOIN height_extremes he

),
shortest_avg AS (

        AVG(paf.avg_finishing) AS group_avg_finishing
    FROM player_avg_finishing paf
    CROSS JOIN height_extremes he
    WHERE paf.height = he.min_height
)

    group_avg_finishing

    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM shortest_avg

WITH champion_2009 AS (
    -- Find the champion driver for 2009 (driver with highest total points)
    SELECT ds.driverId
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE r.year = 2009
    GROUP BY ds.driverId
    ORDER BY MAX(ds.points) DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
champion_results_2009 AS (
    -- Get all race results for the champion in 2009
    SELECT 
        res.raceId,
        res.fastestLap,
        res.fastestLapTime,
        -- Convert fastestLapTime to milliseconds for comparison
        CAST(
            SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER
        ) * 60000 + -- minutes to milliseconds
        CAST(
            SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') + 1, 
                   INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER
        ) * 1000 + -- seconds to milliseconds
        CAST(
            SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, '.') + 1) AS INTEGER
        ) AS fastestLapMs -- milliseconds part
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    JOIN champion_2009 c ON res.driverId = c.driverId
    WHERE r.year = 2009
      AND res.fastestLap IS NOT NULL
      AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
)
-- Find the absolute fastest lap (minimum time) and return its lap number
SELECT fastestLap AS fastest_lap_number
FROM champion_results_2009
ORDER BY fastestLapMs ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH hamilton_races AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        res.positionOrder,
        res.raceId
    FROM results res
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton'
      AND r.year >= 2010
),
total_races AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM hamilton_races
),
non_first_races AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS non_first_count
    FROM hamilton_races
    WHERE positionOrder != 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_count = 0 THEN 0 
        ELSE ROUND((non_first_count * 100.0 / total_count), 2) 
    END AS percentage_not_first
FROM total_races, non_first_races;

WITH last_races AS (
    SELECT year, MAX(round) AS max_round
    FROM races
    WHERE year < 1975
    GROUP BY year
),
champion_drivers AS (
    SELECT ds.driverId, r.year
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
    JOIN last_races lr ON r.year = lr.year AND r.round = lr.max_round
    WHERE ds.position = 1
)
SELECT cd.year, AVG(res.milliseconds / 1000.0) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM champion_drivers cd
JOIN results res ON cd.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId AND cd.year = r.year
WHERE res.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cd.year
ORDER BY cd.year;

WITH RECURSIVE
user_posts AS (
    SELECT p.Id, p.Tags
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
      AND p.CommentCount = 0
),
split_tags(tag, remaining) AS (
    SELECT 
        SUBSTR(Tags, 2, INSTR(Tags, '>') - 2) AS tag,
        SUBSTR(Tags, INSTR(Tags, '>') + 1) AS remaining
    FROM user_posts
    WHERE Tags IS NOT NULL AND Tags != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        SUBSTR(remaining, 2, INSTR(remaining, '>') - 2),
        SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, '>') + 1)
    FROM split_tags
    WHERE remaining IS NOT NULL AND remaining != '' AND INSTR(remaining, '>') > 0
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM split_tags
WHERE tag IS NOT NULL AND tag != ''
ORDER BY tag;

WITH circuit_lap_times AS (
    SELECT 
        c.circuitId,
        c.name AS circuit_name,
        c.location,
        r.year,
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
        res.fastestLapTime,
        -- Convert fastestLapTime to seconds for numeric comparison
        (CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60
         + CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') + 1) AS REAL)) AS lap_time_seconds
    FROM circuits c
    JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
    JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
        AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
        AND res.fastestLapTime != ''
),
ranked_laps AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY circuitId ORDER BY lap_time_seconds ASC) AS rn
    FROM circuit_lap_times
)
SELECT 
    circuit_name,
    location,
    fastestLapTime AS lap_record,
    driver_name,
    year
FROM ranked_laps
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY circuit_name;

WITH RECURSIVE
german_cards AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.uuid, c.subtypes, c.supertypes
    FROM cards c
    JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
    WHERE f.language = 'German'
      AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL
      AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL
),
split_subtypes AS (
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(subtypes, 1, instr(subtypes || ',', ',') - 1) AS subtype,
           substr(subtypes, instr(subtypes || ',', ',') + 1) AS remainder
    FROM german_cards
    WHERE subtypes != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(remainder, 1, instr(remainder || ',', ',') - 1),
           substr(remainder, instr(remainder || ',', ',') + 1)
    FROM split_subtypes
    WHERE remainder != ''
),
split_supertypes AS (
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(supertypes, 1, instr(supertypes || ',', ',') - 1) AS supertype,
           substr(supertypes, instr(supertypes || ',', ',') + 1) AS remainder
    FROM german_cards
    WHERE supertypes != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(remainder, 1, instr(remainder || ',', ',') - 1),
           substr(remainder, instr(remainder || ',', ',') + 1)
    FROM split_supertypes
    WHERE remainder != ''
),
all_types AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT subtype AS type
    FROM split_subtypes
    WHERE subtype != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT supertype AS type
    FROM split_supertypes
    WHERE supertype != ''
)
SELECT type
FROM all_types
ORDER BY type;

WITH LatestFRPM AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        MAX("Academic Year") AS LatestYear
    FROM frpm
    GROUP BY CDSCode
),
LocallyFundedSchools AS (
    SELECT 
        f.CDSCode,
        f."Academic Year",
        f."Enrollment (K-12)" AS EnrollK12,
        f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS Enroll5_17,
        s.School,
        s.DOCType,
        s.FundingType
    FROM frpm f
    INNER JOIN LatestFRPM lf ON f.CDSCode = lf.CDSCode AND f."Academic Year" = lf.LatestYear
    INNER JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE s.FundingType = 'Locally funded'
),
Differences AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        School,
        DOCType,
        (EnrollK12 - Enroll5_17) AS EnrollmentDiff
    FROM LocallyFundedSchools
    WHERE EnrollK12 IS NOT NULL AND Enroll5_17 IS NOT NULL
),
AvgDiff AS (
    SELECT AVG(EnrollmentDiff) AS AvgEnrollmentDiff
    FROM Differences
)
SELECT 
    d.School AS "School Name",
    d.DOCType AS "DOC Type"
FROM Differences d
CROSS JOIN AvgDiff a
WHERE d.EnrollmentDiff > a.AvgEnrollmentDiff
ORDER BY d.School;

SELECT DISTINCT
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increment_percentage
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
JOIN client c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE l.status = 'D'
    AND d.A12 != 0;

WITH weekly_clients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'
),
weekly_total AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM weekly_clients
),
weekly_male AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS male_count
    FROM weekly_clients
    WHERE gender = 'M'
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (SELECT male_count FROM weekly_male) * 100.0 / 
        (SELECT total_count FROM weekly_total), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_male_weekly;

WITH clients_in_high_salary_districts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
    FROM account a
    JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE di.A11 > 10000
      AND d.type = 'OWNER'
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_female
FROM clients_in_high_salary_districts chsd
JOIN client c ON chsd.client_id = c.client_id;

WITH male_loans AS (
    SELECT 
        l.loan_id,
        l.amount,
        l.date,
        c.gender
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id AND d.type = 'OWNER'
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
),
yearly_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', date) = '1996' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_1996,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', date) = '1997' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_1997
    FROM male_loans
)
SELECT 
    total_1996,
    total_1997,
    (total_1997 - total_1996) * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_1996, 0) AS growth_rate_percent
FROM yearly_totals;

SELECT AVG(amount) AS average_loan_amount
FROM loan
WHERE status IN ('C', 'D')
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM trans
    WHERE trans.account_id = loan.account_id
      AND trans.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
  );

WITH oldest_female AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS oldest_birth_date
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
lowest_salary_among_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(d.A11) AS lowest_a11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F' 
      AND c.birth_date = (SELECT oldest_birth_date FROM oldest_female)
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT oldest_birth_date FROM oldest_female)
  AND d.A11 = (SELECT lowest_a11 FROM lowest_salary_among_oldest)
  AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
ORDER BY a.account_id;

    (SELECT frequency FROM account WHERE account_id = 3) AS statement_frequency,
    (SELECT k_symbol 
     FROM trans 
     WHERE account_id = 3 
       AND type = 'VYDAJ' 
     GROUP BY k_symbol 
     HAVING SUM(amount) = 3539 
     LIMIT 1) AS debit_purpose;
